stories.title: Iran and FIFA hold talks as participation still uncertain
stories.desc: FIFA and Iranian officials discuss Iran's participation in the tournament with just weeks remaining before the opening match

stories.title: World Cup qualifying playoffs complete - 48-team field confirmed
stories.desc: All qualifying playoffs have concluded and the full 48-team roster for this summer's tournament in USA, Canada and Mexico is now finalized

stories.title: Panini 2026 sticker album features record 980 stickers
stories.desc: The largest World Cup sticker collection ever includes all 48 teams with special edition stickers and Coca-Cola exclusive partnership

stories.title: Completing Panini album could cost over $2,000
stories.desc: Estimates suggest collectors may need more than 1,000 packs to complete the 980-sticker album without trading duplicates with other fans

stories.title: Squad deadline approaches as teams finalize rosters
stories.desc: National teams must submit their final squads of 23-26 players by June 2, with club release date set for May 25

stories.title: Shakira and Burna Boy release official World Cup song
stories.desc: FIFA announces 'Dai Dai' as the official 2026 World Cup anthem with Shakira returning to World Cup song duty alongside Burna Boy
